subcodes.first_line: O Ali! Upon thee be My glory and My loving-kindness. This day have We arisen in a noble station and have remembered thee with a remembrance that hath no equal [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا علی علیک بهائی و عنایتی اصبحنا الیوم فی مقام کریم و ذکرناک بذکر لایعادله
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @praise and encouragement, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @prayer for specific individuals; groups
